H_WALLS.DESCRIPTION: Primary building material used for the walls of this house

VALUES.2: Masonry, stone, cement, adobe, metal, glass, and other fabricated materials (sometimes mixed with wood)

H_FLOOR.DESCRIPTION: Primary building material used for the floor of this house

H_ROOF.DESCRIPTION: Primary building material used for the roof of this house

VALUES.1: Masonry, concrete, clay tile, or tiles of unspecified type

H_SANITARY.DESCRIPTION: Household has access to a sewage system or septic tank

VALUES.3: Not connected to sewage disposal system

H_GARBAGE.DESCRIPTION: Household's garbage is collected or disposed

VALUES.1: Collected by a sanitation service (public or private)
VALUES.3: Thrown into street, vacant land, or common area
VALUES.4: Thrown into river, lake, ocean, lagoon, etc.

H_WATER.DESCRIPTION: Physical means by which the housing receives its water

H_COOK.DESCRIPTION: Predominant type of fuel or energy used for cooking

H_PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether a member of the household owned the housing

P_LITERACY.DESCRIPTION: Respondent could read and write in any language

P_SEX.DESCRIPTION: Reports the sex of the respondent

P_ETHNIC.DESCRIPTION: Ethnic group with which a person identified

P_AGE.DESCRIPTION: Age in years as of the person's last birthday

P_EDUCATION.DESCRIPTION: Records the last educational attainment in terms of the level of schooling
